title: stutzia
intro: Stutzia is a type of plant that belongs to the family Rutaceae and is commonly known as the 'Bitter Orange'. The plant is rich in essential oils, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which make it a valuable medicinal plant. The medicinal properties of Stutzia include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for various health conditions. Stutzia can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for its health benefits.
